variables.name: content_pool
variables.description: All blogs keyed by blog_id. Each blog: blog_id, content, time (Unix seconds or ms at load), user_id, nickname, ip_location, reposted_blog_id (empty for root posts), reposted_path (chain blog_ids), repost_count, repost_ids, popularity (runtime rolling-window repost count on ancestors).

variables.name: current_timestamp
variables.description: Simulation clock in Unix seconds; advances each step with power/sigmoid-scheduled day slices.

variables.name: timestamp_duration
variables.description: Width of the next blog window in seconds (distance from current_timestamp covered by current_blogs).

variables.name: simulation_start_timestamp
variables.description: Anchor time at load; used with max_span_days to cap timeline.

variables.name: current_step
variables.description: 1-based step counter updated after each SimEnv._save_step_data.

variables.name: current_blogs
variables.description: Subset of content_pool with blog.time < window_end; used in prompts and recommendation pools.

variables.name: mention_pool
variables.description: Nested user_id -> blog_id -> {mention_message: {blog_id, mention_type (at|repost)}}.

variables.name: user_agent_profile_ids
variables.description: All UserAgent profile IDs; populated at init for metrics denominators (user_repost_count_frequency).

variables.name: reference_embedding_path
variables.description: Path to precomputed blog embeddings JSON for text_similarity metric.

variables.name: reference_csv_path
variables.description: Reference reposts CSV (root blog_id, content) for text_max_reference_similarity metric.

variables.name: popularity_window_days
variables.description: Rolling window (days) for per-blog popularity = chain repost count ending at current_timestamp.

variables.name: recommended_blog_ids
variables.description: Flat list of blog IDs already recommended to this user (legacy union).

variables.name: recommended_blog_ids_by_channel
variables.description: source_type (algorithm|social|search|keep_following) -> step -> [blog_id].

variables.name: mentioned_blog_ids_by_channel
variables.description: mention_type (at|repost) -> step -> [blog_id].

variables.name: keep_following_blog_ids
variables.description: At most one blog ID to re-expose next round via KeepFollowingEvent.

variables.name: recommendations
variables.description: Transient recommendation payload on profile (schema compat).

variables.name: mentions
variables.description: Transient mention payload on profile (schema compat).

variables.name: last_login_timestamp
variables.description: Last social-feed scan time (seconds); social feed uses [last_login, window_end).

variables.name: login
variables.description: Activation flag: 1 active, 0 inactive, -1 unset (set -1 each StartEvent).

variables.name: historical_blogs
variables.description: Historical content IDs received.

variables.name: historical_summary
variables.description: Persona summary used in LLM prompts.

variables.name: type
variables.description: Random Recommendation | Popularity Recommendation | Interest Recommendation | Relevant Search.

variables.name: current_blogs
variables.description: Mirror of env current_blogs updated on StartEvent.

variables.name: recommended_blog_ids_by_user
variables.description: user_id -> list of blog IDs ever pushed to that user.

variables.name: candidate_blog_ids_by_user
variables.description: user_id -> candidate blog IDs for interest recommendation.

variables.name: popularity_distribution
variables.description: Popularity recommendation: [{repost_count, post_count}, ...].

variables.name: random_rec_mau
variables.description: Random recommendation platform MAU.

variables.name: random_rec_avg_posts_per_user_month
variables.description: Random recommendation avg posts per user per month.

variables.name: recommendations
variables.description: Transient recommendation output (schema compat).
